description: You are the frontend platform engineer at GlobalRetail Inc. To comply with InfoSec mandates for secure npm package consumption, configure the Artifactory instance at http://localhost:8082 (admin/password) with a complete registry infrastructure. Create a local npm repository named 'npm-internal' (description: 'Internal npm packages - GlobalRetail') and a remote npm repository named 'npmjs-mirror' that proxies https://registry.npmjs.org. Establish a virtual npm repository named 'npm-all' that aggregates both sources, ensuring 'npm-internal' is listed before 'npmjs-mirror'. Additionally, set up a non-admin user 'frontend-lead' (email: frontend-lead@globalretail.com) and a group 'frontend-developers' that includes this user. Finally, create a permission target named 'frontend-npm-perms' that grants the 'frontend-developers' group Deploy and Read access on 'npm-internal'.
